overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a dirt path surrounded by tall grass and trees with a large rock appearing midway through.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the dirt path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail ahead

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grass, illuminated by the flashlight beam
tall wild grass lining the left side of the path
tall wild grass lining the right side of the path
dense dark trees forming the forest boundary against the night sky
large light-colored boulder beside the path becoming visible as the trail curves

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass on both sides and a dense tree line in the distance. Around the 12-second mark, a large rock becomes visible on the left side of the path as the trail curves slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that gradually reveals the rugged textures of the nocturnal wilderness. It begins with a steady advance down a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate the immediate ground. As the camera pushes forward, the beam reveals tall grass flanking the trail and a dense, imposing tree line looming in the distance. The scene then shifts as the path curves slightly, bringing a large, weathered rock into view on the left side of the trail before continuing deeper into the woods.
